title: MiYoni Dogs 13127 8-inch Westie, White
features: From Aurora's highly popular MiYoni Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Expertly designed with life like features
Children will love this beautiful real life animal
description: From the manufacturer MiYoni Westie Aurora World's Miyoni premium plush animals are made with superior materials and great attention to detail. Every item is beautifully designed and features realistic air-brushed colour accents to replicate the animals as found in nature. Each animal features a special hang tag with unique species information. This is a stunning Westie Dog featuring a super soft white plush material.
